steps.title: Compare each museum's peak
steps.content: The question asks for the year when both museums individually had their highest number of visits. The National Museum of the American Indian peaks at 1.2 million visits in 2017, and the National Museum of African American History and Culture peaks at 2.4 million visits in 2017.

steps.title: Reject nonpeak years
steps.content: A, B, and C name years when at least one museum's visit count was below its own peak. The same peak year for both museums is the remaining option. The answer is D.
